description:
Jahi asks a witch to make a potion to turn Doux evil and later on, Doux runs into a hero.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Majo no Kusuri ga Kiki Sugiru!! / Yuusha ga Tayorinasa Sugiru!!
The Witches` Potions Work Way Too Good!! / The Hero Is Just Too Unreliable!!
魔女の薬が効きすぎる!! / 勇者が頼りなさすぎる!!
